subject: Status review: meeting milestone in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-3757
body: Intelligence from Canberra indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the meeting banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-3757. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
